zh.lifeSummary: 當Alain de Dinan於1088年出生在法國布列塔尼迪南時，他的父親Geoffrey de Dinan27歲，母親Radegonde Nerondes20歲。他和Eléonore de Penthièvre至少有3個兒子和2個女兒。他去世於大約1157年在法國布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫迪南享年70歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭戴文比德福德。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alain de Dinan于1088年出生在法国布列塔尼迪南时，他的父亲Geoffrey de Dinan27岁，母亲Radegonde Nerondes20岁。他和Eléonore de Penthièvre至少有3个儿子和2个女儿。他去世于大约1157年在法国布列塔尼o-達阿爾莫迪南享年70岁，埋葬在英国英格兰戴文比德福德。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Dinan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Irish (now mainly counties Clare and Cork): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Daghnáin ‘descendant of Daghnán’, possibly a diminutive of dagh ‘good’.
French: habitational name from Dinan, in Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany. This surname is very rare in France.

variants.name: Dineen
meanings: Irish (Cork and Limerick): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Duinnín ‘descendant of Duinnín’, a byname from a diminutive of donn ‘brown-haired man’ or ‘chieftain’.

nameMeanings.name: Alain
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Breton form of Alan, now common in all parts of France. See Alan .

en.lifeSummary: When Alain de Dinan was born in 1088, in Dinan, Brittany, France, his father, Geoffrey de Dinan, was 27 and his mother, Radegonde Nerondes, was 20. He had at least 3 sons and 2 daughters with Eléonore de Penthièvre. He died about 1157, in Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Brittany, France, at the age of 70, and was buried in Bideford, Devon, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alain de Dinan est né en 1088, à Dinan, Bretagne, France, son père, Geoffrey de Dinan, avait 27 ans et sa mère, Radegonde Nerondes, avait 20 ans. Il a eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles avec Eléonore de Penthièvre. Il est décédé environ 1157, à Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, France, à l’âge de 70 ans, et a été enterré à Bideford, Devon, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alain de Dinan 1088 in Dinan, Bretagne, Frankreich geboren wurde, war sein Vater Geoffrey de Dinan 27 und seine Mutter Radegonde Nerondes 20. Er hatte mit Eléonore de Penthièvre mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er starb um 1157 im Alter von 70 Jahren in Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Frankreich und wurde in Bideford, Devon, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alain de Dinan è nato il nel 1088 nel Dinan, Bretagne, Francia, il suo padre, Geoffrey de Dinan, aveva 27 anni e il suo madre, Radegonde Nerondes, aveva 20 anni. Lui avuto almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie con Eléonore de Penthièvre. Morì circa 1157, nel Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, all'età di 70 anni, e fu sepolto a Bideford, Devon, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Alain de Dinanが1088年にフランスブレタグンディナンで生まれた時，父Geoffrey de Dinanは27歳，母Radegonde Nerondesは20歳であった。彼はEléonore de Penthièvreとの間に少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘をもうけた。彼は約1157年にフランスブレタグンクoテス-ド'アルモーディナンで70歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスデボンビデフォードにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alain de Dinan(이)가 1088년 프랑스 브레타그니 딘아에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Geoffrey de Dinan(은)는 27세였고, 그의 어머니 Radegonde Nerondes(은)는 20세였다. 그는 Eléonore de Penthièvre(와)과 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 대략 1157년 프랑스 브레타그니 co츠-드'아모르 딘아에서 70세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 데폰 비데퍼드에 묻혔다.

mn.Bideford, Devon, England, United Kingdom: Bideford, Devon, Англи, Нэгдсэн Вант Улс
mn.West Buckland, Somerset, England: West Buckland, Bro an Hañv, Английн

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alain de Dinan nasceu em 1088, em Dinan, Bretagne, França, seu pai, Geoffrey de Dinan, tinha 27 anos e sua mãe, Radegonde Nerondes, tinha 20 anos. Ele teve pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas com Eléonore de Penthièvre. Ele faleceu aproximadamente 1157, em Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, França, com 70 anos, e foi sepultado em Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alain de Dinan родился в 1088 г. в местности динан, бретагн, Франция, его отцу по имени Geoffrey de Dinan было 27 лет, а матери, которую звали Radegonde Nerondes, 20. У него было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери от Eléonore de Penthièvre. Он умер около 1157 г. в местности динан, кoтес-д'армор, бретагн, Франция в возрасте 70 лет и был похоронен в местности бидефорд, девон, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alain de Dinan nació en 1088, en Dinan, Bretagne, Francia, su papá, Geoffrey de Dinan, tenía 27 años y su mamá, Radegonde Nerondes, tenía 20 años. Tuvo por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas con Eléonore de Penthièvre. Murió aproximadamente 1157, en Dinan, Côtes-d'Armor, Bretagne, Francia, a la edad de 70 años, y fue sepultado en Bideford, Devon, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
